description_long: This cabin features a long, rectangular structure with a steeply pitched green gable roof, accented by multiple dormer windows on both sides. The roof is adorned with decorative end scrolls and a prominent stone chimney with a yellow cap on one side. The front and rear facades each have a large triangular gable with a central entrance, flanked by wooden beams and small round windows. The exterior walls are clad in green panels with brown trim, giving the building a rustic yet orderly appearance. The dormer windows are symmetrically placed, each with a circular window and brown framing, adding architectural interest and natural light. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional Scandinavian and rustic cabin styles, suitable for residential use in a suburban or park setting.
description: A long, green-roofed cabin with symmetrical dormer windows, a stone chimney, and decorative gable ends, featuring rustic wood and green paneling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance under a large gable, flanked by brown beams and a small round window above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the cabin, three dormer windows with circular panes, and the stone chimney near one end.
description_view_2: Rear view with a matching gable, no visible entrance, and the chimney structure on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three dormer windows and the stone chimney positioned at the far left.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with symmetrical dormers, decorative end scrolls, and a stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Six circular dormer windows symmetrically distributed along both long sides, each set into a small gable; one small round window above the main entrance on the front and rear facades
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade beneath the large gable; no other doors visible
